no: Belm ring mod create-apr-rings-from-belmkundanesnt/ Warning: it consumes one of the three vanilla +apr weapons for each (increasingly better) ring. Interesting for 2h weapon users. Some mods nerfing APR items (like aHungry Tweaks' Balance Item +APR will render it moot
sum: Adds a djinn in Trademeet that can convert speed weapons (Belm, Kundane, Scarlet Ninja-To) into +APR rings, making two-handed weapon builds more viable.
